purpose: Describe the future local office rhythm that KosmoOrbit may orchestrate without enabling live automation today.

routines.title: Morgenstart der KosmoZentrale
routines.intent: Read local health, project packages, review gates and blocked actions before the office starts.

routines.title: Projektfokus und Blocker
routines.intent: Show project status, next safe action, open context inputs and human review decisions.

routines.title: KosmoDesign Review Session
routines.intent: Open KosmoDesign only as context review and keep design generation blocked until gates are closed.

routines.title: Lern- und Ausbildungsmodus
routines.intent: Explain office standards, school topics and safe project context without write authority.

routines.title: Abendabschluss
routines.intent: Summarize completed checks, open risks, suggested next actions and whether a push decision is needed.

routines.title: Not-Stopp und Freigabelinie
routines.intent: Keep uploads, external sync, public publish, model start, tool launch and destructive writes blocked until explicit approval.

next_actions: Show this routine as a static KosmoOrbit panel.
Later connect routines to local telemetry only after privacy, persistence and owner approval rules are defined.
Keep the current demo in review-only mode until a real local runtime contract exists.
